name: "Testosterone Boosters"
summary: Herbal/OTC 'test boosters' (Tribulus, D-aspartic acid, etc.) do not meaningfully raise testosterone or build muscle in healthy men. Marketing outpaces evidence.
effect: No reliable effect on testosterone, muscle, or strength in healthy men; a waste of money.
safety: Variable — some products are under-regulated and may be contaminated or mislabeled.
